---
title: "A framework for design model-structured neural networks for model and control physical systems"
author:
  - "Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini"
publication: "UPAEP University, Puebla, Mexico (2025)"
type: presentation
categories:
  - "Presentations"
  - "Model-Structured Neural Networks"
url_source: 
url_preprint: 
journ: "UPAEP University, Puebla, Mexico"
venue: "UPAEP University, Puebla, Mexico"
year: 2025
doi: ""
pdf: presentation.pdf
pub_number: 32
order: -32
image: slide.png
---

## Summary

Presentation by **Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini** at **UPAEP University, Puebla, Mexico** (2025) on a **framework for designing model-structured neural networks for modeling and control of physical systems**. The talk covers the **Neu4mes** project, motivation for MSNNs versus black-box networks, the **nnodely** workflow, and demonstrative use cases on drones, quadrupeds, and vehicles.

::: {.presentation-preview}
![](slide.png){fig-alt="First slide: framework for MSNN design at UPAEP" width=95%}
:::
